title: App Settings - General - Licenses no wifi  [New]
scenario: Verify license and source links behavior when app is opened without WiFi
steps: Turn off WiFi on the device.
Tap each license link (e.g., MIT, Apache 2.0, etc.).
Verify the license opens with a headline, description, and Cancel (X) button visible.
Tap the Source link for each license.
expected: Each license link opens with a headline, description, and Cancel (X) button visible. Each Source link displays an error screen.
